mapper.update: UPDATE t_trade_order SET frozen_quantity = frozen_quantity - #{amount}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{orderId} AND frozen_quantity >= #{amount}

UPDATE t_trade_order SET quantity = quantity - #{reduceQuantity}, amount = amount - #{reducePrincipal}, accumulated_income = accumulated_income - #{reduceIncome}, frozen_quantity = frozen_quantity - #{reduceQuantity}, -- 记得释放冻结！ update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND quantity >= #{reduceQuantity} -- 乐观锁防止超卖（扣成负数）
mapper.select: SELECT o.id AS order_id, o.accumulated_income AS order_income, IFNULL(SUM(p.daily_profit), 0) AS real_sum_income FROM t_trade_order o -- 关联收益流水表 LEFT JOIN t_trade_daily_profit p ON o.id = p.order_id -- 只查持有中(1)或已赎回(2)的订单，状态根据你实际情况调整 WHERE o.status IN (1, 2) GROUP BY o.id -- 【核心】找出 账目不平 的坏蛋 (允许 0.01 误差) HAVING ABS(o.accumulated_income - IFNULL(SUM(p.daily_profit), 0)) > 0.01

SELECT user_id, prod_id, ( -- 当前持有的份额 IFNULL(SUM(amount), 0) + -- 已经赎回的份额 (查 t_trade_redemption_record) IFNULL((SELECT SUM(amount) FROM t_trade_redemption_record WHERE user_id = t_trade_order.user_id AND prod_id = t_trade_order.prod_id AND status = 2), 0) ) AS amount FROM t_trade_order GROUP BY user_id, prod_id
